# Agent Conduct (meta fixture)

## Capability

meta-version — cross-cutting behavioural boundaries for agents (fixture). Rules-only technique
with no protocol or operations.

## Rules

### file-sensitivity

Do not modify core configuration files without explicit user direction.

### communication-tone

Use measured technical language.
